calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $2,350,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 21, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
